texto: There are those who wish to read everything. Do not try to do this. Let it> alone. The number of books is infinite, and you cannot follow> infinity...For where there is no end, there can be no rest; where there is> no rest, there can be no peace; and where there is no peace, God cannot> dwell.
explicacao: Citação de Hugh of St. Victor sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “There are those who wish to read everything. Do not try to do this. Let it> alone. The number of …” articula fe, books, reason em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como termino e reason.
